title: verify-hardware-measurements output
description: stdout JSON produced by `tinfoil-conformance verify-hardware-measurements`. SPEC §6 verdict.

matched_id.description: id of the hardware measurement entry that matched (first match per SPEC §6.3 step 3).

code.description: SPEC-anchored rejection. HARDWARE_NO_MATCH: no hw entry matches (covers empty hw_list per §6.3 step 4). ENCLAVE_MEASUREMENT_TYPE_INVALID: enclave_measurement.type is not TdxGuestV2 (§6.3 step 1). ENCLAVE_REGISTER_COUNT_INVALID: TDX type but register count != 5 (§6.3 step 1).
